# Caugia — GTM Diagnostics & Operating System for B2B SaaS

> Caugia is a GTM diagnostics company that builds deterministic scoring engines for B2B SaaS revenue systems. The core products are the GTM Intelligence Report (45-page board-level diagnostic) and GRIP OS (constraint-driven GTM execution system with AI advisor).

## What Caugia Does

Caugia evaluates Go-to-Market systems across four structural dimensions using the GRIP Framework (Guidance, Resources, Implementation, Performance). The diagnostic identifies the primary structural constraint in a revenue system, quantifies its impact, and sequences the interventions required to resolve it.

## Products

### GTM Intelligence Report — €2,495 one-time
45-page board-level diagnostic. 265 questions, 72 deterministic scoring engines, constraint analysis and 90-day execution plan. Delivered within 1 hour.

### GRIP OS — from €799/month
Constraint-driven GTM execution system. Combines diagnostic intelligence with AI-powered governance, action cascades, drift detection, and 272 integrations.

### GRIP Brain (Sophie) — included in GRIP OS Full
AI advisor powered by Claude that knows every metric in your workspace. Ask anything about your GTM system via text or voice.

### Free GTM Score Quiz
10 questions. 2 minutes. Instant directional signal on GTM maturity. No email required.

## The GRIP Framework

GRIP organizes a B2B SaaS revenue system into four dimensions, each containing three diagnostic pillars:

- **Guidance:** GTM Strategy & Leadership, Market Intelligence, Product Marketing
- **Resources:** Pricing & Packaging, Product Readiness, Enablement
- **Implementation:** Demand Generation, Sales Execution, Revenue Operations & Systems
- **Performance:** Customer Success & Expansion, Data & Insights, Alignment & Governance

The assessment contains 265 questions across all 12 pillars. Scoring is deterministic: same inputs produce the same scores.

## Core Concepts

- **Revenue Architecture:** The structural design of how a company converts market opportunity into recurring revenue.
- **Revenue Leakage:** The gap between the revenue a GTM system could produce and what it actually produces, typically 15-30% of potential ARR.
- **Constraint Sequence:** The order in which interventions should be applied to produce maximum system improvement with minimum investment.
- **Growth Archetypes:** Structural patterns (30+) that describe specific GTM imbalances and their consequences.
